violations.text: Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the rack on the side of the cold hold area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

The floor in the basement especially around the soda syrup area have an accumulation of dried spilled liquid, soil residue, and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and basement storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
Inspector observed spillage from hose on boxes of food. PIC informed to install splash guard on shelving unit. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
